name: travel-book-lite-theme
style: TravelBookLite parchment/book pixel UI, adapted as reusable Godot UI theme resources.
constraints: Original panel and popup textures are used; panel centers remain flat color.
Book cover and book page textures are kept available as fixed TextureRect assets and optional StyleBoxTexture resources.
PNG imports are lossless with mipmaps disabled for crisp pixel UI.
Button01a frame files are treated as Button state artwork, not timeline animation frames.
Mouse cursor click frames are provided as SpriteFrames for UI-layer cursor or click feedback.

source.author: Crusenho Agus Hennihuno
license_summary: Commercial and personal use are allowed.
Modification and redistribution inside a game are allowed.
Do not resell or publish the original or adapted material as an asset pack.
NFT or similar uses are forbidden.
Credit or product link is required, and changes should be indicated.

travel_book_popup_panel.role: plain parchment popup or text field

travel_book_button_focus.role: square button keyboard or gamepad focus state

travel_book_mouse_cursor_click_ring_fram.role: UI-layer click burst at the mouse position; not usable as an OS cursor animation.

travel_book_mouse_cursor_click_pointer_f.role: Two-frame pointer click accent for UI feedback.

travel_book_slot_cursor_frames.role: Looping slot cursor highlight for selected inventory or skill cells.

button_state_mapping.note: These source files are state artwork for Button theme states, not a SpriteFrames timeline.
